raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.4.5 to support Java 11 and modernize the build configuration.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.4.x does not support Java 11; upgrading is required to compile and run on the target JDK.

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 11.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 11 to utilize features and libraries compatible with the new JDK version.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.4.5 to support Java 11 and modernize the build configuration.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.4.x does not support Java 11; upgrading is required to compile and run on the target JDK.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 11 to align with the target JDK.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must target Java 11 to utilize its features and ensure compatibility with the upgraded dependencies.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to 30.1.1-jre to ensure compatibility with Java 11.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Guava may have runtime issues or lack support for Java 11 modules/features.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Paho MQTT client to 1.2.5 to fix connection issues and ensure Java 11 compatibility.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions may have known connection bugs or lack full Java 11 support.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Refactor MQTT connection setup to use MqttConnectOptions and fix password type to char array.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.why_exists: The setPassword method in MqttConnectOptions expects a char[] argument; passing a String causes a compile-time error due to type mismatch.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Refactor MQTT connection setup to use MqttConnectOptions and fix password type to char array.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.why_exists: The setUserName and setPassword methods on DefaultMqttPahoClientFactory were deprecated or removed in newer Spring Integration versions, requiring the use of setConnectionOptions with an MqttConnectOptions instance. Additionally, setPassword expects a char[] rather than a String.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.general_idea: Add missing import for MqttConnectOptions class.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/src/main/java/.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class MqttConnectOptions.
